articles.title: As OpenAI files for IPO, Sam Altman’s eye-scanning company is doing layoffs, report says
articles.description: Tools for Humanity, Sam Altman's identity verification company, is reportedly struggling to generate revenue and will downsize its staff.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Apple’s WWDC AI demos looked more real after $250M false ad settlement
articles.description: The vibe of Apple's 2026 WWDC keynote felt like a spouse proudly listing all the honey-do-list items tackled. One subtle example: the many AI demos
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: OpenAI files confidentially for IPO, following Anthropic
articles.description: The filing comes a little more than a week after its main rival, Anthropic, also filed to go public, ramping up the race between the two AI firms.
articles.author: Rebecca Bellan

articles.title: Apple plays catch-up at WWDC
articles.description: Apple spent much of its WWDC keynote highlighting fixes, performance improvements, and long-requested features before unveiling its upgraded
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Apple bets cheaper AI will woo small developers
articles.description: As AI experimentation grows more expensive, Apple is waiving cloud API costs for developers with fewer than 2 million first-time App Store downloads.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.description: Waymo has acquired a massive 5,500-acre proving ground in Arizona owned by Route 14 Investment Partners LLC, a Delaware shell company associated with
articles.author: Kirsten Korosec, Sean O'Kane

articles.title: Microsoft’s open source tools were hacked to steal passwords of AI developers
articles.description: Microsoft shut down dozens of GitHub code repositories for Azure and AI coding tools after a reported hack.
articles.author: Zack Whittaker

articles.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more
articles.description: Apple primarily made the case for an improved experience with its longstanding Siri assistant, which like most other announcements had a hefty
articles.author: Morgan Little, Aisha Malik

articles.title: Pentagon says Alibaba, Baidu, BYD, and Unitree support China’s military
articles.description: The Trump administration released the updated version of the list four months ago and then quickly pulled it without explaining why
articles.author: Sean O'Kane

articles.title: Apple just taught your iPhone to finish your sentences, your photos, and your workflows
articles.description: Apple is adding new AI-powered features to Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps.

articles.title: Apple will let you build workflows using AI in its new Shortcuts app
articles.description: Shortcuts gets an AI upgrade, letting you describe the workflow you want in a prompt.

articles.title: Apple’s Image Playground doesn’t suck anymore
articles.description: Apple's AI image generator is getting a makeover that could make it more competitive.

articles.title: Apple’s Photos app is getting new AI editing features
articles.description: A new spatial "Reframe" feature will let users use AI to adjust perspectives.

articles.description: Siri is finally getting its own app.

articles.title: Apple is fixing the headache of splitting the bill with its new Siri in Camera feature

articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Apple puts parents back in control of kids’ iPhone use
articles.description: Apple is putting control back into the hands of parents with more granular screen time features.

articles.title: Apple’s Health app can now tell you if you’re in perimenopause
articles.description: Cycle tracker will now notify women when their cycle patterns are suggestive of perimenopause.
